script_text: Retelling means telling a story in your own words.
You keep the most important parts.
And you leave out the tiny details.
Every story has three big parts.
The beginning. Who is in the story and what is happening?
The middle. What is the problem or the big event?
The end. How does it all work out?
Listen. Tom wanted to win the race. He practiced every day. On race day, he came in first!
Beginning. Tom wanted to win a race.
Middle. He practiced every single day.
End. He won! The lesson? Practice helps!
Ask yourself, what did the character learn? That is the lesson.
Now you are ready to practice retelling stories!
